caption: A man is seated at a desk in what appears to be a recording studio or podcast set. He wears a white baseball cap, a black hooded sweatshirt with "BOSS TALK" printed in gold and white, a gold chain, and a gold watch on his left wrist. He is wearing large over-ear headphones and speaks into a professional microphone mounted on a boom arm. The background features a white wall with yellow stars and the text "UNION MUSTLE" repeated, alongside a blue sign that reads "Where BOSSES Talk!". To his right, there is a black container with a red and white label that says "TALK OUT". Small logos, including one that says "T-Talk", appear in the corners of the scene. Across the sequence, the man remains in the same position, slightly shifting his head and facial expression as he speaks.
